name: HNS_SUBJECT_VL
query: SELECT HNS_SUBJECT_B.SUBJECT_ID, HNS_SUBJECT_B.SUBJECT_AREA_ID, HNS_SUBJECT_B.SUBJECT_CODE, HNS_SUBJECT_B.DISPLAY_SEQUENCE, HNS_SUBJECT_B.ENABLED_FLAG, HNS_SUBJECT_B.DELETED_FLAG, HNS_SUBJECT_TL.SUBJECT_NAME, HNS_SUBJECT_B.CREATED_BY, HNS_SUBJECT_B.CREATION_DATE, HNS_SUBJECT_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, HNS_SUBJECT_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HNS_SUBJECT_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HNS_SUBJECT_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER FROM HNS_SUBJECT_B INNER JOIN HNS_SUBJECT_TL ON HNS_SUBJECT_B.SUBJECT_ID = HNS_SUBJECT_TL.SUBJECT_ID AND HNS_SUBJECT_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
